_comment: Variables to poll from the PLC.
Each entry defines one digital sensor on the conveyor system.
name        - Friendly identifier used throughout the collector (must be unique).
plc_tag     - PLC address / tag name to read (update to match your PLC's addressing).
description - Human-readable description of what this sensor monitors.
invert      - Set to true if the sensor is normally-closed (active LOW) and you
want the collector to treat a LOW signal as 'box present'.
signal_type - How this sensor affects zone box counts:
'origin'     : First arrival sensor. Increments the listed zone.
'exit'       : Box leaves the system. Decrements zone_from.
zone_from   - Zone whose count decreases when this sensor fires (transition/exit).
zone_to     - Zone whose count increases when this sensor fires (origin/transition).
Zone naming convention: L<level>Z<zone>  e.g. L1Z1 = Level 1 Zone 1.
Valid zones: L1Z1 L1Z2 L1Z3 L2Z1 L2Z2 L2Z3 L3Z1 L3Z2 L3Z3
To add a new sensor, append another entry to the 'sensors' array.

sensors.name: origin_entry
sensors.description: Box arrives at the start of the conveyor (enters L1Z1)

sensors.name: L1Z1_to_L1Z2
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 1 Zone 1 into Level 1 Zone 2

sensors.name: L1Z2_to_L1Z3
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 1 Zone 2 into Level 1 Zone 3

sensors.name: L1Z3_to_L2Z1
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 1 Zone 3 into Level 2 Zone 1

sensors.name: L2Z1_to_L2Z2
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 2 Zone 1 into Level 2 Zone 2

sensors.name: L2Z2_to_L2Z3
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 2 Zone 2 into Level 2 Zone 3

sensors.name: L2_exit
sensors.description: Box exits the system at Level 2 (exit point 1)

sensors.name: L2Z3_to_L3Z1
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 2 Zone 3 into Level 3 Zone 1

sensors.name: L3Z1_to_L3Z2
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 3 Zone 1 into Level 3 Zone 2

sensors.name: L3Z2_to_L3Z3
sensors.description: Box transfers from Level 3 Zone 2 into Level 3 Zone 3

sensors.name: L3_exit
sensors.description: Box exits the system at Level 3 (exit point 2)
